REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS GARY TSIFRIN, FRANCESCA WONG, JEFF WINTER, AND CLAUDIA WINTER'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND OBTAIN JUDGMENT ON AWARD IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 21, 2019 FOR MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE ARBITRATION AWARD BY JULY 31, 2019 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. IF PARTIES AGREE ON A DIFFERENT DATE FOR A HEARING (AFTER AUGUST 21, 2019), PARTIES MAY JOINTLY NOTIFY THE COURT TO AVOID AN APPEARANCE SOLELY FOR THE PURPOSE OF CONTESTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE NOTIFICATION MAY BE PROVIDED TO DEPARTMENT 501 AT DEPARTMENT501CONTESTTR@SFTC.ORG NO LATER THAN 8:00 A.M. ON JULY 26, 2019. JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED (D501)

Off Calendar Jul-26-2019 Continued To Aug-21-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs GARY TSIFRIN, FRANCESCA WONG, JEFF WINTER, and CLAUDIA WINTER's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Obtain Judgment On Award is continued to August 21, 2019 for moving party to provide a courtesy copy of the arbitration award by July 31, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. If parties agree on a different date for a hearing (after August 21, 2019), parties may jointly notify the Court to avoid an appearance solely for the purpose of contesting the new hearing date. The notification may be provided to department 501 at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org no later than 8:00 a.m. on July 26, 2019.
